creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Vladimir, I fear nobody takes care about your message. Because Xfce's bugs are reported to the xfce@ mailing list, and there are no committers.

Committers are not interested by the Xfce desktop (I hope not):

- bug #218941 can be closed (see bug #218941, comment #1) despite this, Kubilay Kocak (koobs@) changed status and added quarterly flag
- bug #219337 can be closed too, same committer (koobs@) added additional flags, features are almost implemented in xfce4-terminal 0.8.6

I submitted a patch in order to update support of libgarcon in Mk/Uses/xfce.mk, nobody in the portmgr team reviewed or committed my changes, despite this message [1] from Rene Ladan (rene@) in ports mailing list.

About deskutils/xfce4-tumbler it's problematic, because all versions prior 0.1.32 are seriously buggy. I quickly backported a fix, then submitted update to 0.1.32 then to 0.2.0, again no respond. I also write a message about these updates [2].

If you want complete list of open ports, see my page [3].

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2017-June/109057.html
[2] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-xfce/2017-July/001829.html
[3] https://app.assembla.com/spaces/xfce4/subversion/source
